sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n89235" key="prosepipone/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσεπι-πονέω</orth>, <sense id="n89235.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">work still more</tr_>: <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">προς επιπονεῖν ἀκούοντας</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">take the additional trouble</tr_> of listening, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0026.tlg002.perseus-grc1:44" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aeschin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.44</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
